messages.content: Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (On 27 Oct 2023, Project has been supported Kompong Thom PCCT to support in banner printing on education awareness on Human Trafficking and Safe Migration for Kampong Thom Provincial during the Water Festival on 28-29 Oct 2023)

On 27 Oct 2023, Kompong Thom PCCT received support from Project to print banners educating on Human Trafficking and Safe Migration for Kampong Thom Provincial during the Water Festival on 28-29 Oct 2023.

Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (Provide the training to new community-based groups (CBGs) on human trafficking and safe migration children’s rights, child protection including online child protection, CPiE and disaster risk reduction, child nutrition, positive parenting, and gender equity & equality. Communities based groups are actively participate in project activities and they are enjoy and interested in the topic of meeting/training, learning and sharing. They also committed to bring all knowledge to apply and share to their family and community. There are 15 Communities Based Groups are supported with numbers/participants 298/192 F, Children 20/15 Girls.  (9 Groups in BMC =163/76F, Children 18/15F, 6 Groups in KPT= 135/116F, Children 2/1F).)

New community-based groups (CBGs) receive training on human trafficking, safe migration, children's rights, child protection (including online child protection), CPiE, disaster risk reduction, child nutrition, positive parenting, and gender equity & equality. CBGs actively participate in project activities and are enthusiastic about the training, eager to learn and share. They are committed to applying and sharing the knowledge within their families and communities. A total of 15 CBGs are supported, with 298 participants (192 females), and 20 children (15 girls). BMC has 9 groups with 163 participants (76 females) and 18 children (15 girls), while KPT has 6 groups with 135 participants (116 females) and 2 children (1 girl).

Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (Assist the legal duty bearers to conduct community education campaigns on child protection, human trafficking and unsafe migration, gender-based violence, reporting mechanism and promote clean and green environment to reduce the impact of climate change. n 12 October 2023, Attend and Support refreshments for Pouk Administration to conduct to conduct education campaigns on Human Trafficking, Safe Migration and Child Abuse with participants 162/81F.)

Support legal duty bearers in conducting community education campaigns on child protection, human trafficking, unsafe migration, gender-based violence, reporting mechanisms, and climate change mitigation. On 12 October 2023, provide refreshments for Pouk Administration's education campaign on Human Trafficking, Safe Migration, and Child Abuse, attended by 162 participants (81 females).

Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (On 12 October 2023, project provided support on refreshments for Pouk Administration’s education campaign on Human Trafficking, Safe Migration, and Child Abuse, attended by 162 participants (81 females).)
On 12 October 2023, the project supported refreshments for Pouk Administration's education campaign on Human Trafficking, Safe Migration, and Child Abuse, with 162 participants (81 females).

Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (Contribution for Refreshments to Battambang Provincial Interfaith Religion to conduct environment cleaning in Battambang Town on 21 October 2023 with participants 200/89f ( Buddhist, Islam, Bahai, Chinese and Christianity).

Contribute refreshments for Battambang Provincial Interfaith Religion's environment cleaning event in Battambang Town on 21 October 2023, with 200 participants (89 females) representing Buddhist, Islam, Bahai, Chinese, and Christian communities.

Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (	For October 2023, project is ongoing to support for Children Councils Meeting in target areas. Children Council is the approach to strengthen child protection mechanism in school, project have been supported schools for student council monthly meeting in Prasath Khanr, Phumi Korou and Koe Por Lower Secondary School with participants Total=115/66F

During October 2023, the ongoing project supports Children Council Meetings in target areas as an approach to enhance child protection mechanisms in schools. The project has supported monthly meetings for student councils in Prasath Khanr, Phumi Korou, and Koe Por Lower Secondary School, with a total of 115 participants (66 females).

Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (On 12 October 2023, Project has been collaborated and contributed to NCCT to conduct training on human trafficking procedure and reporting mechanism to relevance NCCT member in Pailin Province with participants 50/16F.)

On 12 October 2023, the Project collaborated with and supported NCCT in conducting a training on human trafficking procedures and reporting mechanisms for NCCT members in Pailin Province. The training had 50 participants, including 16 females.

Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (Continue provide Training on children's rights, the national child protection policy, and discussion on their roles and responsibilities provided CBGs, school students, schoolteachers, directors, and school supporting committee (SSC) members. )
Continue training CBGs, school students, schoolteachers, directors, and SSC members on children's rights, the national child protection policy, and their corresponding roles and responsibilities.

Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (Provide refresher training to children and youth groups on children's rights, child protection, child nutrition, child online protection, positive children, Gender equality and equity, environment and disaster risk management, and child protection in emergencies.)

Provide refresher training to children and youth groups on child rights, child protection, child nutrition, child online protection, positive upbringing, gender equality, environmental conservation, disaster risk management, and child protection during emergencies.
Paraphrase this sentence (Explore for job skill training with partners to seek for opportunity to share to beneficiaries)
Collaborate with partners to explore job skill training opportunities and share them with beneficiaries.

Paraphrase this sentence (Support local authorities to provide the training on human trafficking, safe migration, and child protection to 3692 people(2579F) and Child 475(F269) across 3 provinces (K.Speu, Takeo and Kampot))

Assist local authorities in training 3692 individuals (2579 females) and 475 children (269 females) across three provinces (K.Speu, Takeo, and Kampot) on human trafficking, safe migration, and child protection.

Paraphrase this sentence (01 training on human trafficking, safe migration, and child protection were provided to by church leaders and pastors with 24/12F church and community members participating.)
Church leaders and pastors conducted one training session on human trafficking, safe migration, and child protection, with the participation of 24 church and community members (12 females).

Paraphrase this sentence (	Assisted to 13 Church Pastors/leaders to provided 24 awareness about human trafficking, safe migration, and child protection to their small group, community 845/470F (child60).

Assisted 13 church pastors/leaders in delivering 24 awareness sessions on human trafficking, safe migration, and child protection to their small group and community. A total of 845 participants (470 females) were reached, including 60 children.
Paraphrase this sentence ( Continue to provide career counseling in order to support survivors got stable jobs/income and reducing their movement.)
Continue offering career counseling to assist survivors in obtaining stable employment and income, thereby reducing their mobility.

Paraphrase this sentence (In October, there are 6 counsellors (4 in NW and 2 in SE) remaining in the program due to the staff turnover in September. However, counsellors still received clinical supervision regularly, one session per month to maintain the quality of their counselling and their well-being. TIC and Counselling Specialist is willing to support team whenever they are reaching out for help. Obviously, there were 6 sessions of individual clinical supervision, which provided to 06/06F counsellors staffs in this month)

In October, there are 6 counselors (4 in NW and 2 in SE) who remain in the program due to staff turnover in September. However, these counselors continue to receive regular clinical supervision, with one session per month, to uphold the quality of their counseling and ensure their well-being. The TIC and Counselling Specialist are ready to support the team whenever they seek assistance. Overall, 6 individual clinical supervision sessions were provided to all 6 counselors (all females) this month.

Paraphrase this sentence to be more concise (	In October, there are 6 counselors (4 in NW and 2 in SE) who remain in the program due to staff turnover in September. Each counselors continue to receive regular clinical supervision, with one session per month, to maintain the quality of their counseling and ensure their well-being. The TIC and Counselling Specialist is ready and willing to support the team whenever they are reaching out for help. In this period, 6 individual clinical supervision sessions were provided to all 6 counselors (all females) this month. )

In October, 6 counselors (4 in NW and 2 in SE) remained in the program despite staff turnover in September. They receive monthly clinical supervision to maintain counseling quality and well-being. The TIC and Counselling Specialist offer support when needed. A total of 6 individual supervision sessions were provided to all 6 counselors (all females) this month.

Paraphrase this sentence (As usual, Hagar Cambodia still closely cooperated with Hope Trust in providing technical support session to their counsellor for guiding, coaching, and sharing on the clinical practice. For this report period, there was one session of technical support provided to 01/01F Hope Trust’s counsellor staff. )

Hagar Cambodia continued its close collaboration with Hope Trust by providing a technical support session to their counselor. The session included guidance, coaching, and sharing on clinical practice. During this reporting period, one technical support session was provided to the counselor at Hope Trust (a female staff member).

Paraphrase this sentence (To promote staff’s well- being and help them maintaining their long-term healthy, productivities, and avoiding burnout, Counsellors regularly provide self-care session to all staffs every Monday morning twice per month. 46/28F of Hagar's staff participated in the self-care session to improve their wellness and reduce their personal and work stress. )

In order to support the well-being and long-term productivity of the staff and prevent burnout, Counsellors conduct bi-monthly self-care sessions for all staff members every Monday morning. A total of 46 staff members (28 females) from Hagar participated in these sessions to enhance their wellness and alleviate personal and work-related stress.

Paraphrase this sentence (In the reporting period, 50 cases notes, submitted by counsellors in CMS system have been constantly monitored and reviewed to ensure the accuracy and precision of their data entry and received the technical feedback for improving their clinical works. )

During the reporting period, continuous monitoring and review were conducted on 50 case notes submitted by counselors in the CMS system. This was done to ensure accurate and precise data entry, and provide technical feedback aimed at enhancing their clinical work.

Paraphrase this sentence (5 psychological counselling sessions, of which 03 are phone counselling and 2 are face-to-face counselling to keep supporting and follow up their emotion of the old special cases, 03/03F survivors. During the sessions, clients reported that they felt better and much relieved of the psychological symptoms they had in the previous session. They could currently enjoy with their lives and be able to cope with their daily issues and distress. )

A total of 5 psychological counseling sessions were conducted, with 3 being phone counseling and 2 being face-to-face counseling. These sessions aimed to provide ongoing support and emotional follow-up for old special cases, specifically 3 female survivors. Clients reported significant improvement and relief from previous psychological symptoms. They expressed a newfound ability to enjoy their lives and effectively cope with daily challenges and distress.

Paraphrase this sentence (	On 27th October, our Hagar Cambodia had an opportunity to exhibit our Hagar’s mental health service to 2407 participants in World Mental Health Day Event, which conducted by Royal University of Phnom Penh at Cambodia-Korea Cooperation Center. Hagar had a booth to display the Hagar’s work, particularly counselling service, the counselling tools and approaches that Hagar created, systematic counselling plan books, trauma informed care, …  This event also provided Hagar the occasion of participating with other 21 NGOs and institutions in promoting mental health among Cambodian people, especially Cambodian youth to aware of mental health issues and mental health care.  )

Hagar Cambodia had the opportunity to showcase our mental health services at an event held by the Royal University of Phnom Penh on 27th October. The event, which took place at the Cambodia-Korea Cooperation Center, drew 2407 participants. Hagar had a booth to exhibit our work, with a specific focus on counseling services, counseling tools and approaches developed by Hagar, systematic counseling plan books, and trauma-informed care. The event also provided Hagar the chance to collaborate with 21 other NGOs and institutions in raising awareness about mental health issues and care, particularly among Cambodian youth.

Paraphrase this sentence ( In this month, TIC and Counselling specialist provided the induction of TIC and counselling service to 02/02F new staff on board, so they can learn and better understand about counselling for the team further cooperation and support.)

During this month, the TIC and Counselling specialist conducted an orientation session on Trauma-Informed Care (TIC) and counseling services for two new staff members, both female. This session aimed to enhance their understanding of counseling practices and foster cooperation and support within the team.
